final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color and typography specification sheet for the fragrance brand "染秋 (RAN QIU)", intended for brand asset library use across packaging and digital platforms.

Style/medium: brand identity specification sheet, clean layout with color swatches and typography samples
Composition: grid layout showing primary color swatch, secondary color swatches, and font specimens in designated zones
Subject: "染秋 (RAN QIU)" brand color system and typography standards
Scene/backdrop: clean white or minimal neutral background for maximum color accuracy
Lighting/mood: neutral, clinical, professional
Color palette: warm autumn palette — primary: deep amber/ochre (inspired by persimmon and osmanthus), secondary: muted maple red, warm taupe, soft cream, with accents of tea green
Materials/textures: flat color blocks, clean typography specimens
Text (verbatim): "染秋 (RAN QIU)", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", color names in both Chinese and English, hex codes, font names
Constraints: must show primary color + secondary colors + typography hierarchy clearly, suitable for brand guideline documentation
Avoid: gradients unless essential, generic flat-Behance aesthetic, Western perfume brand clichés
